item.name: Dress-up Tataru
item.description:
Say what you will─she wears it well.

Use item to acquire the dress-up Tataru minion.
item.tooltip:
Tataru's expression grows
ever darker each time I
see her pass by.
   - Slafborn
item.specialactiondescription:
Reduces minion summoning recast time by 50%.
Duration: 10s
